project: Real-Time Credit Card Fraud Detection MLOps System
description: Production-grade fraud detection pipeline processing credit card transactions in real-time using Kafka, feature engineering, Isolation Forest + XGBoost ensemble, with automated drift detection and retraining.

phases.name: Foundation & Transaction Ingestion
phases.theme: Kafka producers, transaction schemas, data simulation, CI/CD

phases.name: Feature Engineering & Risk Scoring
phases.theme: Velocity features, merchant risk, geolocation, behavioural patterns

phases.name: ML Models & Real-Time Inference
phases.theme: Isolation Forest, XGBoost, ensemble, FastAPI sub-100ms serving

phases.name: Decision Engine & Case Management
phases.theme: Rule engine, block/flag/allow decisions, analyst dashboard, feedback

phases.name: Drift Detection & Auto Retraining
phases.theme: Evidently drift, Airflow retraining DAG, champion/challenger, canary

phases.name: Hardening, Tests & Documentation
phases.theme: Integration tests, load tests, security, full docs
